name: postlabs-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for AI agent development and workflow automation

plugins.name: openai-agents
plugins.description: Build AI agents with OpenAI Agent SDK - tools, handoffs, guardrails, and sessions

plugins.name: google-adk
plugins.description: Build AI agents with Google ADK - multi-agent systems, callbacks, and deployment

plugins.name: git-sync
plugins.description: Git commit protocol for multi-session collaboration with structured commit messages

plugins.name: context-export
plugins.description: Export coding context as prompt for web LLMs (Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Gemini)

plugins.name: smart-mode
plugins.description: Autonomous end-to-end development mode with 4-phase loop: discuss, prepare, develop, verify

plugins.name: session-sync
plugins.description: Write session summary to docs_hj/ and commit+push all changes including the summary

plugins.name: action-creator
plugins.description: Sprint-based multi-agent pipeline for website automation action generation
